notes: Built from T1 results (scores): top 3 carryover = frank.eth 38, dave.eth 31, erin.eth 26. New entrants on former bottom-3 ports 3100–3102 — restart or re-load those three agent processes for grace/henry/ivy. Top 3 keep same url as T1.

players.name: dave.eth
players.strategyPrompt: Alternate cooperate and defect regardless of history.

players.name: erin.eth
players.strategyPrompt: Randomly choose cooperate or defect with equal probability each round.

players.name: grace.eth
players.strategyPrompt: Cooperate until opponent defects, then tit-for-tat.

players.name: henry.eth
players.strategyPrompt: Defect on the first round only, then mirror the opponent's last move.

players.name: ivy.eth
players.strategyPrompt: Cooperate if cumulative score is behind the opponent's; otherwise defect.
